builtin.name: Task
builtin.purpose: Launch sub-agents for complex multi-step tasks
builtin.description: Spawns an independent Claude sub-agent with its own context window. Used for parallelising work and isolating complex operations. The sub-agent receives a description, optional allowed tools list, and returns a result string.

builtin.name: Bash
builtin.description: Runs arbitrary shell commands in a zsh environment. The working directory persists between calls but shell state (variables, functions) does not. Supports background execution via run_in_background.

builtin.name: Glob
builtin.description: Matches file paths against a glob pattern using the filesystem. Returns paths sorted by modification time. Much faster than Bash find for file discovery.

builtin.name: Grep
builtin.description: Searches file content using ripgrep. Supports regex patterns, file type filters, and context lines. Returns matches with file paths and line numbers.
builtin.returns: matching lines with file and line number

builtin.name: Read
builtin.description: Reads the full contents of a file at an absolute path. Must be called before Write to avoid overwriting unknown content. Supports optional line range.

builtin.name: Edit
builtin.description: Replaces an exact string match within an existing file. More efficient than Write for modifications as only the diff is transmitted. Requires reading the file first.

builtin.name: Write
builtin.description: Writes full file content to the filesystem. Creates the file if it doesn't exist. For existing files, must Read first. Prefer Edit for modifications.

builtin.name: WebFetch
builtin.description: Fetches a URL and returns the content as text (HTML stripped to readable text by default). Used for reading documentation, APIs, or web resources.

builtin.name: WebSearch
builtin.description: Performs a web search and returns a list of results with titles, URLs, and snippets. Used when current information is needed.

plugin.name: Skill
plugin.description: Fetches a named skill document and injects its content as context. Skills contain process instructions, checklists, and guidance. Most skills are invoked by reading them — the content itself is the instruction.

plugin.name: Agent
plugin.purpose: Enhanced agent dispatch with skill support
plugin.description: Like Task but with enhanced routing. Selects the appropriate sub-agent type based on task complexity and required capabilities. Supports specifying skill pre-loading for the sub-agent.

plugin.name: AskUserQuestion
plugin.purpose: Explicitly ask the user a question
plugin.description: Pauses execution and presents a question to the user, waiting for their response before continuing. Used when a decision genuinely requires human input.

plugin.name: TaskCreate
plugin.description: Creates a tracked task in the session task list with a title, description, and initial status. Tasks persist across context and provide a structured way to track progress.

plugin.name: TaskUpdate
plugin.description: Updates the status or description of an existing task. Status values: pending, in_progress, completed, blocked.

plugin.name: TaskGet
plugin.description: Returns the current state of a single task by its id.

plugin.name: TaskList
plugin.purpose: List all tasks in the session
plugin.description: Returns all tasks registered in the current session with their status.

mcp.description: Provides a full browser automation API via Playwright. Supports navigation, interaction, screenshots, network inspection, form filling, and JavaScript execution.
Interfaces with CircleCI for pipeline inspection, triggering, failure analysis, and test results.
Send messages, read channels and threads, search Slack, manage canvases, and look up users.

mcp.purpose: Jira issue and Confluence page management
mcp.description: Full CRUD for Jira issues, Confluence pages, comments, and worklog. Includes JQL search and workflow transitions.
Query charts and datasets, manage dashboards, run experiments, inspect cohorts, review session replays, and access user feedback.
